query:
UPDATE customer_price_history cph
INNER JOIN orders o ON cph.orderId = o.id
SET cph.currency = o.currency
WHERE cph.orderId IS NOT NULL;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute UPDATE customer_price_history cph
